title: Creamy Turkish Rice Pilaf
description: A comforting and flavorful side dish, perfect for accompanying your favorite meals. This creamy Turkish rice pilaf is easy to make and packed with delicious flavor.
instructions: Heat oil in a medium saucepan over medium heat.
Add the pilaf and cook, stirring frequently, until lightly toasted.
Add the rice and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add 2 cups of water and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15-20 minutes or until the liquid is absorbed.
Stir in the mustardy and creamy ingredients.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
